//Loc x y
0 0.0 0.0 "depot"
1 432.0 1544.0 "product aisle 9 bloc 1 rank 86"
2 480.0 404.0 "product aisle 10 bloc 0 rank 40"
3 48.0 1323.0 "product aisle 1 bloc 1 rank 51"
